initial_program:
% Grid dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(N) :- N = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..N-1) :- n_cols(N).

% count nonzero cells per column
colCount(C, CountC) :- CountC = #count{ R : input(R, C, Color), Color != 0 }.

% cells that should stay zero (above the block of nonzeros)
zero_cell(R, C) :- colCount(C, CountC), (N - CountC) > R, row(R), col(C).

% cells that need a value (must be zero)
output_cell(R, C) :- zero_cell(R, C).

% each such cell gets exactly one colour
1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R, C).

% a zero cell must never receive a nonzero colour
:- zero_cell(R, C), output(R, C, Color), Color != 0.

% ordering of the nonzero tiles (bottomup) and placement
bottomK(C, K, Color) :- input(R, C, Color), Color != 0, row(R), col(C), K = #count{ R2 : R2 > R, input(R2, C, Color2), Color2 != 0 }.

output(NMinus1MinusK, C, Color) :- bottomK(C, K, Color), (N - 1) - K = NMinus1MinusK, row(NMinus1MinusK), col(C).

#show output/3.

n_cols(N) :- N = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
